　　阴差阳错的一夜荒唐，改变了段野的命运。
　　段野向心上人承认错误，但是可惜，人家根本不在乎。
　　那夜的女人拿着户口本找上门，段野被迫闪婚。
　　段野以为自己今后肯定是没有好日子过了，谁知道...
　　当他身边危险重重，他那高冷的老婆却突然带着无数保镖冲过来，最后朝他伸手：
　　“老公，听话，我们回家。”","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/72e621e462c6430695ff7bb777b1ef75","author":"江浩辰","author_id":"","book_id":"7342359852519263294","book_name":"酒后失控，被迫闪婚京圈大小姐","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#302820","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"4.9万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":261,"name":"都市日常","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=261&name=都市日常&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1,"name":"都市","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1&name=都市&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":389,"name":"单女主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=389&name=单女主&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":834,"name":"1v1","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=834&name=1v1&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7342359942659047998","read_count":"48465","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1217700"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.8","serial_count":"562","tags":"都市日常,都市,单女主,1v1,无后宫","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o2680faa3ba117c56d4b0764f27fd168e~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779508475&x-signature=U92HWXO1mlP5JzIbgI33ZOycMwA%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"2096093196452624","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"143"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260324115434DF04B7DB8EF94C95D148"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读5小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":3,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":6421,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":16829,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":4955},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_aut 　　那夜的女人拿着户口本找上门，段野被迫闪婚。
　　段野以为自己今后肯定是没有好日子过了，谁知道...
　　当他身边危险重重，他那高冷的老婆却突然带着无数保镖冲过来，最后朝他伸手：

r_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7482860518636454680","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"总结：一本有生活味，有情感的书。
可惜：中间的逻辑，不是很严谨，不然在我心中足以登顶；
忠告：不想眼睛进沙子的话，看到一半，就可以功成身退了
暖暖：希望来世的你，活在一个充满温暖与爱的环境，有一个如段野一般的人依然爱着你～
洛姐姐：能成为你的另一半，也太幸福了吧！
南星：希望你受十八层地狱之苦，至魂灭魄散。






【涉及剧透的提示】
本书认为最烙印入心的人物：叶暖
一半篇章，将叶暖疯子的坏印象根植于心.. .
后面得知，是性南的pua...
两级反转，作者还给了浓墨重写，心里又寒又痛
试问：当好闺蜜不断给予对象“变心”的暗示下，有多少人可以抵挡住？
更别说，家庭的内忧，心理pua的外患。
可即便如此。
暖暖最后，还是爱着，还是善良着...
愿来世，幸福安康。
此外；
到了中间，有点怀疑作者换人，或者说作者状态不好....剧情实在夸张，有点无语；
好在坚持下去后，大概是段野再度与洛姐姐在一起后，恢复了往日模样；","text_exts":[{"e":73,"s":71,"text":"暖暖","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%9A%96%E6%9A%96&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317743244754C95D148%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227482860518636454680%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227342359852519263294%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%9A%96%E6%9A%96%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1742255114,"group_id":"7342359852519263294","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"新人报道，请多关照！","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N6kTOlfqmkRl+7aYQubje0s=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":2,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/57d1bbc4de5b4a29bc23a4112a917755~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776880364&x-signature=lXhoCbc5iwOySfdqUNWtUl3Ztf0%3D","user_id":"215127355559036","user_name":"绝世之尘"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"215127355559036","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":true,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"sticker":{"expire_time":1727887074,"is_worn":true,"sticker":{"add_context":"","bg_color":"#FFE1DD","can_worn":false,"id":1,"name":"吃瓜群众","small_url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/99d8abedb53eea031f973b1251119d85","sticker_type":1,"url":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/origin/novel-static/eaf916cdd4f4860ea2a74b0d0e3718f1"}},"user_title_info":[{"en_title":"author_level_1","intro":"{"title_name":"作家Lv.1","title_id":"author_level_1"}","is_author_title":true,"is_vip_title":false,"label":"{"title_text":"作家Lv.1","title_default_color":"#FFFFFF","title_dark_color":"#FFFFFF","bg_def
